log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Goliath — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 4 falling damage. HP: 174/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Goliath — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 169/178
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Goliath — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Goliath — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Goliath — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Goliath — Bardic Musician HP: 31/67
→ Goliath — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 9 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Goliath — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Goliath — Bardic Musician HP: 12/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Goliath — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Goliath — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Goliath — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
Young Red Dragon attacks Goliath — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Goliath — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
